violations.text: Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Utensils (single-use knives) observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the store walk-in condenser fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, residue, and other debris. Fan guards are to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
